steps.title: Find the intercept signs
steps.content:
At the y-intercept, set $x=0$.
$$t=c$$
Since $c$ is positive, $t>0$. At the x-intercept, set $y=0$.
$$0=-30r^3+c$$
$$r^3=\frac{c}{30}$$
Since $c$ is positive, $r>0$.

steps.title: Choose the matching signs
steps.content: The relationship requires both $r>0$ and $t>0$. The answer is B.
